CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Channels.Channel.label: Default
CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Channels.Channel.description: Catch-all channel for callers that don't specify one.

CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Channels.Channel.label: Vanilla RimWorld
CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Channels.Channel.description: Verse.Log calls from Assembly-CSharp or core/DLC.

CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Channels.Channel.label: Unity engine
CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Channels.Channel.description: UnityEngine.Debug.Log entries captured via threaded callback.
